datapoints.description: OSD apply (flush to disk) latency in milliseconds
datapoints.name: apply_latency_ms

datapoints.description: OSD read throughput in bytes per second
datapoints.name: read_bytes

datapoints.description: OSD write throughput in bytes per second
datapoints.name: write_bytes

datapoints.description: OSD average operation latency in milliseconds
datapoints.name: op_latency_avg_ms

description: Per-OSD latency, IOPS, throughput, and utilization metrics via Thanos Querier
technicalNotes: Per-OSD performance metrics. apply_latency and commit_latency are gauges from Ceph MGR in ms. IOPS and throughput use rate() over 5m window. op_latency_avg_ms divides cumulative sum by count and converts seconds to ms. used_percent computed from stat_bytes ratio.
name: ODF_Ceph_OSD_Performance
